creator: jharris@widomaker.com
text:
ports/multimedia/vlc-devel has a size/checksum mismatch

Fix: -----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1
NotDashEscaped: You need GnuPG to verify this message

This tarball was rerolled, possibly from repo. version 18493 to 18682.
Most changes are timestamps in .po files, and the detached GPG signature
looks good:

===> Verifying PGP signature vlc-0.8.6a.tar.bz2.asc
gpg: Signature made Fri Feb  2 03:45:22 2007 EST using DSA key ID AA5F4DE6
gpg: please do a --check-trustdb
gpg: Good signature from "VideoLAN Release Signing Key (2007)"
gpg: WARNING: This key is not certified with a trusted signature!
gpg:          There is no indication that the signature belongs to the owner.
Primary key fingerprint: 8700 D908 8473 D895 D18C  E0C4 9028 17E4 AA5F 4DE6
===> Valid sig. from expected ID 0x8700D9088473D895D18CE0C4902817E4AA5F4DE6.
